items.title_en: OpenAI agrees to acquire Astral, which makes Python tools for developers, to integrate its team into Codex, and says Codex has 2M+ users, up 3x since January (Agnee Ghosh/Bloomberg)

items.title: PwC's US boss Paul Griggs says partners who resist AI have no place at the firm, and it plans to convert some services into AI-powered automated tools (Stephen Foley/Financial Times)

items.title_en: Baidu joins Alibaba in raising prices for its AI computing power-related services by ~5% to 30% and its parallel file storage system by 30% from April 18 (South China Morning Post)
items.title_zh: 百度与阿里巴巴一起从 4 月 18 日起将其人工智能算力相关服务的价格提高约 5% 至 30%，并将其并行文件存储系统的价格提高 30%（《南华早报》）
items.title_bilingual: 百度与阿里巴巴一起从 4 月 18 日起将其人工智能算力相关服务的价格提高约 5% 至 30%，并将其并行文件存储系统的价格提高 30%（《南华早报》） / Baidu joins Alibaba in raising prices for its AI computing power-related services by ~5% to 30% and its parallel file storage system by 30% from April 18 (South China Morning Post)

items.title: Sen. Marsha Blackburn releases a Senate draft of the TRUMP AMERICA AI Act, a federal framework to replace state AI laws, incorporating KOSA and the NO FAKES Act (Oma Seddiq/Bloomberg Law)
items.title_original: Sen. Marsha Blackburn releases a Senate draft of the TRUMP AMERICA AI Act, a federal framework to replace state AI laws, incorporating KOSA and the NO FAKES Act (Oma Seddiq/Bloomberg Law)
items.title_en: Sen. Marsha Blackburn releases a Senate draft of the TRUMP AMERICA AI Act, a federal framework to replace state AI laws, incorporating KOSA and the NO FAKES Act (Oma Seddiq/Bloomberg Law)
items.title_zh: 参议员玛莎·布莱克本 (Marsha Blackburn) 发布了参议院《特朗普美国人工智能法案》草案，这是一个取代各州人工智能法律的联邦框架，其中纳入了 KOSA 和《无假货法案》（Oma Seddiq/彭博社法律）
items.title_bilingual: 参议员玛莎·布莱克本 (Marsha Blackburn) 发布了参议院《特朗普美国人工智能法案》草案，这是一个取代各州人工智能法律的联邦框架，其中纳入了 KOSA 和《无假货法案》（Oma Seddiq/彭博社法律） / Sen. Marsha Blackburn releases a Senate draft of the TRUMP AMERICA AI Act, a federal framework to replace state AI laws, incorporating KOSA and the NO FAKES Act (Oma Seddiq/Bloomberg Law)

items.title: Figma's stock closed down ~8% on March 18 after Google updated its Stitch AI coding tool for UI design; FIG is down ~80% since the company's IPO in August 2025 (John Wang/@j0hnwang)
items.title_original: Figma's stock closed down ~8% on March 18 after Google updated its Stitch AI coding tool for UI design; FIG is down ~80% since the company's IPO in August 2025 (John Wang/@j0hnwang)
items.title_en: Figma's stock closed down ~8% on March 18 after Google updated its Stitch AI coding tool for UI design; FIG is down ~80% since the company's IPO in August 2025 (John Wang/@j0hnwang)
items.title_zh: 在谷歌更新其用于 UI 设计的 Stitch AI 编码工具后，Figma 的股价在 3 月 18 日收盘下跌约 8%；自该公司 2025 年 8 月首次公开募股以来，FIG 已下跌约 80% (John Wang/@j0hnwang)
items.title_bilingual: 在谷歌更新其用于 UI 设计的 Stitch AI 编码工具后，Figma 的股价在 3 月 18 日收盘下跌约 8%；自该公司 2025 年 8 月首次公开募股以来，FIG 已下跌约 80% (John Wang/@j0hnwang) / Figma's stock closed down ~8% on March 18 after Google updated its Stitch AI coding tool for UI design; FIG is down ~80% since the company's IPO in August 2025 (John Wang/@j0hnwang)

items.title_zh: 谷歌更新了 Stitch，它允许用户将自然语言提示转化为 UI 设计，引入“AI 原生”设计画布和推理设计代理（Rustin Banks/The Keyword）
items.title_bilingual: 谷歌更新了 Stitch，它允许用户将自然语言提示转化为 UI 设计，引入“AI 原生”设计画布和推理设计代理（Rustin Banks/The Keyword） / Google updates Stitch, which lets users turn natural language prompts into UI designs, introducing an "AI-native" design canvas and a reasoning design agent (Rustin Banks/The Keyword)

items.title: AppMagic: Apple's revenue from GenAI apps grew from ~$35M in January 2025 to a high of $101M in August 2025, with 75% coming from ChatGPT and only ~5% from Grok (Wall Street Journal)

items.title_en: AppMagic: Apple's revenue from GenAI apps grew from ~$35M in January 2025 to a high of $101M in August 2025, with 75% coming from ChatGPT and only ~5% from Grok (Wall Street Journal)
items.title_zh: AppMagic：Apple 来自 GenAI 应用程序的收入从 2025 年 1 月的约 3500 万美元增长到 2025 年 8 月的 1.01 亿美元，其中 75% 来自 ChatGPT，只有约 5% 来自 Grok（华尔街日报）
items.title_bilingual: AppMagic：Apple 来自 GenAI 应用程序的收入从 2025 年 1 月的约 3500 万美元增长到 2025 年 8 月的 1.01 亿美元，其中 75% 来自 ChatGPT，只有约 5% 来自 Grok（华尔街日报） / AppMagic: Apple's revenue from GenAI apps grew from ~$35M in January 2025 to a high of $101M in August 2025, with 75% coming from ChatGPT and only ~5% from Grok (Wall Street Journal)

items.title:
人与AI 协作时的「指令」大致可分为三类：

1. 完全放开：「我想要这个，你去想下如何实现它」

2. 完全约束：「我要实现这个，你先这样，再那样，最后给我这么来一下」

3. 约束边界，放开路径：...
